name: Zombie Battlefield Survivors
short_description: Zombie Battlefield Survivors is a top-down view roguelike action shooter game. Fight against hordes of zombies, constantly upgrading attributes and collecting credits to enhance your character's abilities.
detailed_description:
Game Background

Two decades after the cataclysm, the Church has created a zombie battlefield in the wasteland to select the best fighters. You can collect credits on the battlefield to unlock new characters and weapons.

Game Features

  • Multiple characters, each with unique skill attributes.
  • Multiple special weapons, each with exclusive functions, allowing you to freely customize according to your preferences.
  • There is no limit to weapon attribute slots, meaning characters can endlessly level up.
  • Multiple diverse scenes, each featuring unique elite zombie monsters.

How long can you survive and fight against hordes of zombies.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
